# Nathan Jones

> Software engineering leader, founder, and educator based in Chicago, IL. Founder of NestingBird, Associate Faculty at Northwestern Kellogg.

## About
- [Homepage](https://mrjonesbot.com): Personal portfolio with AI chat and fit check tools

## Projects
- [NestingBird](https://nestingbird.co): HOA management for self-managed buildings and property managers
- [RiseKit](https://risekit.co): Workforce development platform
- [Product Heist](https://productheist.com): Product specification software for interior designers

## Open Source
- [Sage](https://github.com/mrjonesbot/sage): Natural language reporting for Rails
- [Snitch](https://github.com/mrjonesbot/snitch): Production exception monitoring for Rails
- [Highlite](https://github.com/mrjonesbot/highlite): PDF highlighting

## Profiles
- [GitHub](https://github.com/mrjonesbot): Open source projects and contributions
